assertions.assertion: The migration runner project has .WithReference() for the database resource
The migration runner project has .WaitFor() for the SQL Server or database resource
The IdentityServer project uses .WaitFor() referencing the migration runner project, not directly waiting for SQL Server
assertions.rationale: IdentityServer has both WaitFor(migrations) AND WaitFor(sqlServer), meaning it waits for SQL Server directly too

assertions.assertion: The IdentityServer project still has .WithReference() for the database resource so it gets the connection string
assertions.rationale: IdentityServer is missing .WithReference(identityDb) - it won't have the connection string
